targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT instance_id) AS "value" FROM telemetry_report WHERE received_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days'
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(error_count), 0) AS "value" FROM telemetry_report WHERE received_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days'
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(panic_count), 0) AS "value" FROM telemetry_report WHERE received_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days'

SELECT version, COUNT(*) AS count FROM (SELECT DISTINCT ON (instance_id) version FROM telemetry_report WHERE received_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days' ORDER BY instance_id, received_at DESC) sub GROUP BY version ORDER BY count DESC

SELECT deploy_mode, COUNT(*) AS count FROM (SELECT DISTINCT ON (instance_id) deploy_mode FROM telemetry_report WHERE received_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days' ORDER BY instance_id, received_at DESC) sub GROUP BY deploy_mode ORDER BY count DESC

WITH latest AS (SELECT DISTINCT ON (instance_id) features FROM telemetry_report WHERE received_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days' ORDER BY instance_id, received_at DESC) SELECT unnest(ARRAY['Federation','ActivityPub','Email','Turnstile']) AS feature, unnest(ARRAY[COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE features->>'federationEnabled'='true'), COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE features->>'activityPubEnabled'='true'), COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE features->>'emailEnabled'='true'), COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE features->>'turnstileEnabled'='true')]) AS count FROM latest
SELECT DATE_TRUNC('day', received_at) AS time, COUNT(*) AS reports, COUNT(DISTINCT instance_id) AS instances FROM telemetry_report WHERE $__timeFilter(received_at) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT d.fingerprint, d.biz_code, d.location, (array_agg(d.sample_message ORDER BY d.count DESC))[1] AS sample_message, SUM(d.count) AS total_count, COUNT(DISTINCT r.instance_id) AS instances FROM telemetry_error_digest d JOIN telemetry_report r ON r.id = d.report_id WHERE r.received_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days' GROUP BY d.fingerprint, d.biz_code, d.location ORDER BY total_count DESC LIMIT 10

SELECT os || '/' || arch AS platform, COUNT(*) AS count FROM (SELECT DISTINCT ON (instance_id) os, arch FROM telemetry_report WHERE received_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days' ORDER BY instance_id, received_at DESC) sub GROUP BY platform ORDER BY count DESC

SELECT DATE_TRUNC('day', r.received_at) AS time, SUM(d.count) AS errors FROM telemetry_error_digest d JOIN telemetry_report r ON r.id = d.report_id WHERE $__timeFilter(r.received_at) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1
